text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm walking through the central plaza
with Narita Brian, when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Guess it was just my shadow... Weird...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Did you see that just now?
